response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of diverse full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process discipline. His deep technical breadth and customer-focused delivery history make him a standout candidate despite minimal explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across enterprise and open-source projects
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and infrastructure, directly matching a key requirement
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and dev-ops practices with multiple languages and cloud platforms
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin in resume, though Node.js and Java experience are present
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
Some roles lack detail on team collaboration or product-user translation, though user-focused work is implied
